hooks.command: SESSION_FLAG=".claude/.session-started"; if [ ! -f "$SESSION_FLAG" ] || [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(date -r "$SESSION_FLAG" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0) )) -gt 7200 ]; then mkdir -p .claude && touch "$SESSION_FLAG" && echo '╔══════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║  SESSION START — READ BEFORE ACTING  ║' && echo '╚══════════════════════════════════════╝' && echo '' && cat CONTEXT.md 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- wiki/index.md ---' && cat wiki/index.md 2>/dev/null; fi

echo ''; echo '─────────────────────────────────────────────'; echo 'Did this session produce knowledge worth saving?'; echo 'If yes: run /save to update the wiki and CONTEXT.md'; echo '─────────────────────────────────────────────'
echo '[hook] File edited. Remember: run lint + typecheck before reporting done.'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push --force|reset --hard|rm -rf'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive command requires explicit user confirmation' && exit 1; fi
